FoldRouting._comment: companion-scale R4. The bake planner prices each group-regime view's per-interaction companion transfer (the colour measure's plane-split bytes) and records the fold route in its manifest. A view whose WORST leaf tile exceeds BudgetBytes folds on the server instead of the browser. 32 MB keeps the reference views (worst ~8 MB after R5) on the client, where they fold in tens of ms, and prices REQUIREMENTS' tens-of-MB design scenario remote. Defaults live in Colossus.Application/FoldRouting.cs; docs/DEPLOY.md explains the deploy consequences.
